title: TopBuild (BLD) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target
text: Analyst Ratings & Price Targets: Consensus Rating: Buy. Based on 12 analyst ratings: Strong Buy: 42%. Buy: 8%. Hold: 50%. Sell: 0%. Strong Sell: 0%. Price Target: Wall Street analysts have established a price target of $459.92, indicating a 0% change from the current stock price as of May 16, 2026. Analyst Perspective: Bullish View: The company demonstrates strength in its Installation Services segment with steady performance in Specialty Distribution. Analysts highlight 1Q results that were largely in line with expectations, with a rebound in gross margins and note the value added by TopBuild's acquisition by QXO. Bearish View: Concerns center on TopBuild's exposure to slower residential new construction growth and competitive pressures. The targeted $300 million in cost savings by 2030 is viewed as ambitious, while new five year financial targets may prove conservative given reliance on inorganic growth.
